mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(cs.customer_total, 0) AS customer_total, IFNULL(cs.normal_count, 0) AS normal_count, IFNULL(cs.warning60_count, 0) AS warning60_count, IFNULL(cs.warning30_count, 0) AS warning30_count, IFNULL(cs.warning5_count, 0) AS warning5_count, IFNULL(cs.expired_count, 0) AS expired_count, IFNULL(cs.no_record_count, 0) AS no_record_count, IFNULL(fs.month_amount, 0) AS month_amount, IFNULL(fs.month_count, 0) AS month_count, IFNULL(fs.year_amount, 0) AS year_amount, IFNULL(fs.year_count, 0) AS year_count FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS customer_total, SUM(CASE WHEN t.expire_status = 'NORMAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.expire_status = 'WARNING_60' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning60_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.expire_status = 'WARNING_30' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning30_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.expire_status = 'WARNING_5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning5_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.expire_status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.expire_status = 'NO_RECORD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_record_count FROM ( SELECT c.id AS customer_id, CASE WHEN MAX(r.charge_end_date) IS NULL THEN 'NO_RECORD' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) < 0 THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) <= 5 THEN 'WARNING_5' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) <= 30 THEN 'WARNING_30' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) <= 60 THEN 'WARNING_60' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS expire_status FROM acct_customer c LEFT JOIN acct_service_fee_record r ON c.id = r.customer_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id ) t ) cs CROSS JOIN ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(receive_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS month_amount, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(receive_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS month_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(receive_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS year_amount, COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(receive_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS year_count FROM acct_service_fee_record WHERE deleted = 0 ) fs
